rules.title: House Rules — Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca
rules.description: Facility rules, accommodation terms, and general information. Important details for our guests.

reservation.title: Reservation — Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca
reservation.description: Discover available bungalows and lodges at Sapanca Hat Naturel Resort. Price and availability based on dates and guest count.

rules.heroLead: At Hat Naturel Resort, we have a few important rules to ensure a peaceful and secure holiday for all guests.
rules.checkInDesc: You may check in any time after 14:00. Please let us know your arrival time in advance. Bungalows are cleaned between 11:30 and 14:00 prior to check-in.
rules.checkOutDesc: Please be ready to check out at 11:30. Early check-out is possible, but we cannot extend the check-out time.

items.identity: Upon check-in, your ID details are registered to the police safety system. Every guest — including children and infants — must provide a valid ID or passport. Unregistered stays are not permitted. Guests under 18 cannot stay without a parent.
items.identityWarning: If you arrive without ID or refuse to present one, you will not be allowed to check in. No refund will be issued in such cases.
items.guests: Receiving outside visitors — even briefly — without informing us puts a significant burden of responsibility on the facility. When a short-term visitor arrives, their ID information must be collected and registered with the police safety system.
items.guestsWarning: Hosting unregistered visitors will result in immediate termination of your stay with no refund.
items.pets: We are unable to host pets.
items.trash: Littering and discarding cigarette butts on the grounds, in the garden, or around the bungalow is prohibited.
items.furniture: Please do not move the bungalow's furniture or items. Any damage will be charged to the guest.
items.pool: Use of shampoo and bath foam in the pool is prohibited.
items.poolWarning: Children under 13 are not allowed to enter the pool unattended.
items.fire: Taking the fire pit or BBQ equipment onto the veranda is dangerous and prohibited. Please use them only in your designated garden area.
items.breakfast: Breakfast is served at our cafe between 09:30 and 11:30. We do not offer room service.
items.reservation: We do not offer reservation cancellations or deposit refunds. You may reschedule your stay up to 7 days before the check-in date. Date changes within 1–2 days of check-in are not possible — regardless of personal reasons, weather, or plan changes.

home.heroSubtitle: Premium bungalows nested in nature for an unforgettable stay.
home.aboutLead: A boutique resort where modern comfort meets natural living in Sapanca's unique nature.
home.aboutBody: On our spacious grounds we offer a children's playground, free parking, and 24/7 security for a peaceful holiday. Each bungalow is designed with a different concept; whichever you choose, you'll have a private retreat in nature.
home.roomsSubtitle: Exclusive accommodation options for every taste
home.locationSubtitle: At the heart of Sapanca, surrounded by nature
home.mapIframeTitle: Hat Naturel Resort location — Google Maps
home.aboutSubtitle: In Sapanca, among the trees — far from the city, close to your soul.
home.aboutBodyP1Pre: Hat Naturel was designed for those tired of the noise of big hotels. In our
home.aboutBodyP1Post: spread across the Sapanca forest, every guest steps into a world of their own: a peaceful morning under triangular roofs, a mind set free in the heated pool, shoulders that relax in the warmth of the sauna.
home.aboutBodyP2: Whether a weekend escape or a long retreat — this place welcomes you with the same warmth every time. Because true rest begins where there are no more than 13.
home.highlight1: When you wake up, outside there are only trees and the sound of birds.
home.highlight2: A real reset every season with heated pool and sauna.
home.highlight3: Kitchen, living room, full privacy — not a hotel room, your home.
home.highlight4: A corner that welcomes you with the same warmth every visit.
home.ctaQuoteEm: Pick a date, we'll handle the rest.

restaurant.title: Breakfast
restaurant.subtitle: Sapanca village breakfast
restaurant.lead: With the first light of morning, with nature's sound.
restaurant.intro: A delightful breakfast in Sapanca's fresh air, facing nature. Fresh, local, homemade — with unlimited tea.
restaurant.menuSubtitle: A table full of homemade flavours, freshly prepared each morning.
restaurant.teaLead: Traditional Turkish tea brewed on coal fire — refilled endlessly throughout your breakfast.
restaurant.hoursNote: We open with the first rays of sun.
restaurant.ctaText: You can reach us via WhatsApp for breakfast reservations.

bej.description: Standard 1+1 lodge; 85 m² of spacious living, detached bungalow with nature views. (No pool)
bej.longDescription: Beige Lodge, one of our standard 1+1 lodges at Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca, offers 85 m² of comfortable living and bedroom space with the feel of home. Its detached structure with nature views, modern interior design and warm atmosphere makes it ideal for couples and small families. This lodge has no private pool, but you can fully enjoy the shared facilities on the resort.
bedConfig: 🛋️ Double sofa-bed in the living area

turkuaz.description: Spacious 85 m² 1+1 lodge — for those seeking practical comfort. (No pool)
turkuaz.longDescription: Our Turquoise Lodge 1+1 is 85 m² wide and offers couples and close friends a relaxed holiday experience. With modern equipment that preserves the feeling of home comfort right in the heart of nature, it is an ideal accommodation choice. The lodge has no private pool, but you can enjoy the shared facilities of the resort.
bedConfig: 🛋️ Double sofa-bed in the living area

ucgen-1-1.description: One of the most popular structures — private heated pool, sauna and iconic triangular design. 6 units available.
ucgen-1-1.longDescription: Our 1+1 Triangle Bungalows are among the most preferred structures on the resort, with 6 units in total. The iconic triangular architecture and warm wooden textures offer a unique atmosphere right in nature. Inside each bungalow you will find a private heated pool, jacuzzi, sauna and poolside loungers plus a double-seat swing — for year-round spa enjoyment. With a double bed in the mezzanine and a double sofa-bed plus single sofa-bed in the living area, up to 5 people can stay. Ideal for couples and small families, advantageous in both price and comfort.
bedConfig: 🛋️ Double sofa-bed in the living area

mor.description: Spacious 2+1 layout in 95 m² — family lodge with private summer cooling pool.
mor.longDescription: One of the most eye-catching lodges of the resort, Purple Lodge offers a spacious 2+1 layout across 95 m². Thanks to its private summer cooling pool, poolside loungers and large two-person swing, you can enjoy cooling moments with the family in your garden on hot days. Fireplace comfort brings the same warm atmosphere in winter; an ideal choice for a peaceful family holiday in nature's silence.
bedConfig: 🛏️ 1 double bed in the master bedroom
🛋️ Double sofa-bed in the living area
🛋️ Single sofa-bed in the living area

sari.description: Custom-designed 2+1 lodge of 95 m²; stands out with spaciousness and living comfort. (No pool)
sari.longDescription: Our Yellow Lodge 2+1 was custom designed. Standing out with the spaciousness of the rooms and the breadth of the living space, this detached lodge welcomes you with nature views. You can spend unforgettable family moments in its large garden facing nature. The lodge has no private pool; you can enjoy the shared facilities of the resort.
bedConfig: 🛏️ 1 double bed in the master bedroom
🛋️ Double sofa-bed in the living area
🛋️ Single sofa-bed in the living area

ucgen-2-1.description: Triangular 2+1 of 95 m² — private heated pool, sauna and comfortable living for large families. 3 units available.
ucgen-2-1.longDescription: At Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca our 2+1 Triangle Bungalows were designed for larger families, with 3 units in total. Spanning 95 m², they offer comfortable space for a whole family and overlook nature. Each bungalow includes a private heated pool, jacuzzi, sauna, poolside loungers and a double-seat swing — spa enjoyment in every season. The iconic triangular architecture creates a picture-perfect atmosphere; each unit shares the same interior design and equipment.
bedConfig: 🛏️ 1 double bed in the master bedroom
🛋️ Double sofa-bed in the living area
🛋️ Single sofa-bed in the living area
